products.name: Classic Gold Engagement Ring
products.description: Crafted in pure 22K yellow gold, this classic engagement ring features an elegant braided band design and a polished finish. A timeless symbol of love.

products.name: Royal Diamond Solitaire Ring
products.description: An exquisite 18K white gold ring featuring a brilliant-cut center solitaire diamond, flanked by micro-paved diamonds along the band for maximum sparkle.

products.name: Antique Kundan Gold Necklace
products.description: A magnificent antique kundan necklace set in 22K gold, decorated with intricate floral carvings, gemstone embellishments, and dangling seed pearls.

products.name: Maharani Gold Jhumka Earrings
products.description: Traditional gold jhumkas featuring delicate filigree patterns, miniature gold beads, and a stunning bell-shaped dangle that sways with grace.

products.name: Floral Design Gold Bangles (Set of 4)
products.description: A set of four beautifully matched gold bangles with embossed floral motifs. Perfect for bridal styling or festive celebrations.

products.name: Traditional Gold Mangalsutra
products.description: A modern yet sacred design featuring double black bead chains connected to a stunning gold pendant with floral and geometric engravings.

products.name: Royal Imperial Bridal Wedding Set
products.description: An opulent bridal masterpiece featuring a heavy choker necklace, a long rani haar, matching jhumkas, maang tikka, and a nose ring, detailed with rubies and emeralds.

products.name: Luxury Pearl & Gold Choker
products.description: A high-fashion choker necklace blending rows of premium freshwater cultured pearls with a hand-designed 18K yellow gold floral center clasp.

products.name: Engraved Royal Gold Kada
products.description: A bold and heavy single kada bracelet featuring traditional hand-engraved motifs and a secure side clasp. Designed for both grandeur and comfort.

products.name: Temple Style Ruby Studs
products.description: Exquisite temple jewellery studs depicting the goddess Lakshmi, seated in a lotus, surrounded by rubies and high-purity gold filigree work.
